name: Marsicovetere & Levine Law Group
message: Marsicovetere & Levine Law Group, P.C. investigates and defends serious felony and misdemeanor criminal allegations, DUI/DWI, and motor vehicle-related cases.We are ready to upload 20 GB of corporate documents such as: a lot of legal cases with detailed personal data of customers, medical records, detailed police reports, arrest warrants, numerous confidential documents, etc.
